system.description:
Play the Nemesis to exert yourself to become a master of biotic destruction. Gain access to the Arcana domain.

Foundation Features

Warp: Make a Spellcast Roll against a target. On a success, spend a Hope to make the target Warped. Spellcast and damage rolls against a Warped target gain a bonus equal to your tier. This condition lasts until the GM spends Fear equal to your Instinct to remove it, until you Warp another creature, or until the scene ends.

Exert: Once per session, when you Fail with Fear on a Spellcast Roll from a Domain Card, you can place that card in your Vault to turn it into a Success with Fear. Its recall cost is increased by 2 until your next rest.

Specialization Features

Unstable Warp: When a Spellcast Roll succeeds against your Warped target, you can end the condition and cause a Biotic Detonation. The target takes d20+3 additional energy damage using your proficiency.

Clear Mind: You may add the number of cards in your Vault to your energy damage rolls.

Mastery Feature

Biotic God: Once per long rest, after you make a successful Spellcast Roll, you may cast an additional Spell using the same roll. Then, place that card in your Vault.
